display.purpose: Hero heading only. The single place Geist Sans performs at full scale. Never bold — 600 weight is enough.

headline.purpose: Batch counter; the one large numeral in the workbench chrome.

body.purpose: UUID row values — the primary content surface. Slashed zero mandatory.

title.purpose: Rail section keys (lowercase) and status flags (UPPERCASE). Never title case.

label.purpose: Keyboard shortcuts, status cells, row index numbers. Smallest legible mono step.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: The only drop shadow in the system. Applied to the shortcut reference modal and any future dialogs.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.purpose: Brand mark icon dot. Signals identity, not spatial depth.

shadows.name: status-glow
shadows.purpose: Live status indicator pulse. Communicates active system state.

shadows.name: active-left-bar
shadows.purpose: Active version row indicator. The only inset shadow in the system.

motion.name: d-tap
motion.purpose: Button depress translateY(1px). Immediate feedback on pointer down.

motion.name: d-swap
motion.purpose: Hover/active state swaps — background, border, color.

motion.name: d-settle
motion.purpose: Row copy button settle to copied state.

motion.name: d-panel
motion.purpose: Panel grid UUID list fade on regenerate.

motion.name: d-regen
motion.purpose: Refresh icon spin window during regenerate.

breakpoints.name: workbench-fold
breakpoints.purpose: Below this: rail stacks above panel, UUID row drops its length cell.

components.name: CTA Button (Regenerate)
components.description: Primary call-to-action. One per panel. Accent fill + attached kbd shortcut.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); color: oklch(0.18 0.01 130); border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 80ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-cta:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.86 0.20 130); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-cta-kbd { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; padding: 2px 6px; background: oklch(0.18 0.01 130); color: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); border-bottom-width: 2px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions: Copy All, Download, theme toggle, shortcut overlay trigger.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.18 0.005 60); color: oklch(0.78 0.005 60); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.21 0.006 60); border-color: oklch(0.36 0.008 60); color: oklch(0.97 0.004 60); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.86 0.20 130); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: UUID Row
components.description: The signature component. Four-column grid: index / UUID code / length / copy button.
components.html: 01550e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-44665544000036
components.css: .ds-uuid-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 50px 1fr 50px 90px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 22px; background: oklch(0.18 0.005 60); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); transition: background 80ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-uuid-row:hover { background: oklch(0.21 0.006 60); } .ds-uuid-row:hover .ds-uuid-copy { opacity: 1; } .ds-uuid-row:hover .ds-seg-2 { color: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); } .ds-uuid-index { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.40 0.006 60); font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; text-align: right; padding-right: 16px; } .ds-uuid-code { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.97 0.004 60); font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; } .ds-seg { transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-seg-sep { color: oklch(0.40 0.006 60); } .ds-uuid-len { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(0.55 0.005 60); font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; text-align: right; padding-right: 16px; } .ds-uuid-copy { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.55 0.005 60); border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 4px 8px; opacity: 0.4; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 140ms ease, background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-uuid-copy:hover { opacity: 1; background: oklch(0.21 0.006 60); color: oklch(0.97 0.004 60); }

components.name: Version Row (active)
components.description: Three-column rail selector. Active state uses accent border, left-bar inset, and tinted fill.
components.html:
v4
RandomCryptographically random, no order
●
components.css: .ds-version-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 32px 1fr 14px; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; background: oklch(0.18 0.005 60); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 4px; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-version-row:hover { background: oklch(0.21 0.006 60); border-color: oklch(0.36 0.008 60); } .ds-version-row--active { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.86 0.20 130) 10%, oklch(0.18 0.005 60)); border-color: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); box-shadow: inset 2px 0 0 oklch(0.86 0.20 130); } .ds-version-tag { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(0.21 0.006 60); color: oklch(0.78 0.005 60); text-align: center; } .ds-version-row--active .ds-version-tag { background: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); color: oklch(0.18 0.01 130); } .ds-version-title { display: block; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; color: oklch(0.97 0.004 60); } .ds-version-desc { display: block; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; color: oklch(0.55 0.005 60); } .ds-version-pip { font-size: 8px; color: oklch(0.40 0.006 60); visibility: hidden; } .ds-version-row--active .ds-version-pip { visibility: visible; }

components.name: kbd Element
components.description: Inline keyboard shortcut hint. The 2px bottom border is the key-cap cue — unique to this element.
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; padding: 2px 6px; background: oklch(0.16 0.005 60); color: oklch(0.55 0.005 60); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); border-bottom-width: 2px; border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.5; margin-right: 2px; }

components.name: Status Bar
components.description: Sticky bottom bar. Live pulse dot, shortcut hint, feedback flash cell.
components.html:
v4 · 10 UUIDs
Shift+? for shortcuts
→ copied
components.css: .ds-status-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(0.16 0.005 60); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; color: oklch(0.55 0.005 60); } .ds-status-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; border-right: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); box-shadow: 0 0 8px oklch(0.86 0.20 130); animation: ds-status-pulse 2000ms ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-status-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.35; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-dot { animation: none; } } .ds-status-feedback { color: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); }

components.name: Validator Input
components.description: UUID validation input. Flat style; border shifts to seam-2 on focus.
components.html: Valid v4
components.css: .ds-validator-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-validator-input { flex: 1; background: oklch(0.18 0.005 60); color: oklch(0.97 0.004 60); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 60); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.3, 1); } .ds-validator-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.36 0.008 60); } .ds-validator-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.40 0.006 60); } .ds-validator-badge { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-validator-badge--valid { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.86 0.20 130) 12%, oklch(0.18 0.005 60)); color: oklch(0.86 0.20 130); border: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.20 130); } .ds-validator-badge--invalid { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.62 0.20 25) 12%, oklch(0.18 0.005 60)); color: oklch(0.75 0.18 25); border: 1px solid oklch(0.62 0.20 25); }

narrative.overview:
uuidlab operates at the intersection of CLI discipline and considered craft. It is dense where developers are scanning, spacious where developers are reading, and entirely at rest when not responding to input. The default state is a deep near-black — not a styled brand gesture, but the literal dark that a terminal earns after years of daily use.

This system rejects all three of its closest failure modes by name. It is not SaaS-dashboard grey (blue-tinted panels, sidebar chrome, card-grid layouts). It is not flashy developer marketing (gradient-heavy dark mode, stacked neon accents, glassmorphism). It is not the bare-bones utility that mistakes zero effort for minimal design.

names the space between: a tool with genuine craft opinions that never asks for attention.

The accent color — lime by default, swappable across four palettes — appears only as a consequence of action. Its rarity is structural.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-native by conviction, warm-grey neutral ramp (hue 60°) that reads as ink-and-paper, not blue-shift
Monospace-forward: Geist Mono is body and chrome; Geist Sans is display and prose only
Restrained color strategy: one accent, no secondary palette, no semantic color beyond the accent
Hairline-border structure: 1px seams define space; no drop shadows except the modal lift
Keyboard-first: every action has a shortcut; hover is a hint, not a requirement

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: The accent color appears only as a consequence of user action or current selection — never for decoration, illustration, or section markers. Its rarity is structural: when it appears, it means something.

rules.name: The Warm-Void Rule
rules.body: All neutral surfaces share hue 60° at chroma ≤ 0.008. Never introduce blue-grey, cool neutrals, or true-neutral. The warm micro-tint keeps the system from reading as generic dark-mode.

rules.name: The Floor Rule
rules.body: --ink-4 is the dimmest token used for informational text. Anything lighter is decorative. Never use a lighter value for actionable copy.

rules.name: The Slashed-Zero Rule
rules.body: All monospace text must render with font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01'. A dotted zero reads as O in a 32-character UUID and destroys legibility. Non-negotiable.

rules.name: The Mono-First Rule
rules.body: New UI elements default to Geist Mono unless they are display headings or prose paragraphs.

rules.name: The Title-Case Ban
rules.body: Rail keys are lowercase tracked. Status flags are UPPERCASE. Nothing is Title Case. Title case reads as generic app UI; this tool has a voice.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If you are about to add box-shadow to a card, panel, or button, use --seam border + --bg-3 tonal step instead. The shadow is already taken by the modal.

dos: Do use --accent only at interaction points: active selection, CTA fill, slider thumb, status pulse, copied-row tint.
Do use Geist Mono for all UI chrome, labels, kbd, and data values. Reserve Geist Sans for display headings and prose paragraphs.
Do apply font-feature-settings: 'zero', 'ss01' to every monospace element.
Do use 1px --seam hairlines to define structure. Borders, not shadows.
Do carry state via shape and position alongside color — active rows have a left bar and pip glyph in addition to the accent tint.
Do provide a keyboard shortcut for every primary action.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion by replacing transitions with instant state swaps.
Do compute accent tints inline: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) N%, var(--bg)) where N is context-specific (8%, 10%, 12%).
donts: Don't use blue-tinted surfaces, sidebar navigation chrome, card-grid layouts, or feature-overview patterns. This is not SaaS-dashboard grey.
Don't stack multiple accent colors on a single screen. Switch the active palette via [data-accent] only.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. The active left-bar is box-shadow: inset 2px 0 0 var(--accent).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Use a single solid --accent for emphasis.
Don't use backdrop-filter decoratively. It appears only on the sticky top bar and modal scrim.
Don't add box-shadow to cards, panels, or buttons. --shadow-modal is the only drop shadow.
Don't use Title Case in UI labels.
Don't animate layout properties. Animate transform and opacity only.
Don't add page-load choreography or staggered entrance sequences.
Don't invent a fourth button variant. Three roles (CTA, ghost, row-copy) are complete.
Don't use --ink-4 or lighter for actionable copy.
Don't add border-bottom: 2px to anything other than <kbd>.
